creator: gigigranvisir@gmail.com
text:
The chain was Windows 10 pc with NTFS -> usb key FAT32 -> FreeBSD 11.0 with UFS.
I prefer to not work directly on the usb key, so as root I mounted the usb key and as user I copied the whole Audacity project folder in my home directory.

Could be I mismatching the ownership during this passage? As I copied the files from the usb key, I should have created completely new files with full ownership as user....or not?
